message:
Add observation promotion and failure analysis generators

Add buildObservationPrompt/generateFromObservations for creating story
cards from vet observations, and buildFailurePrompt/generateFromFailure
for generating follow-up investigation cards from failed runs. Extract
shared splitAndValidateCards helper to DRY up card parsing logic.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
